adaptive_card.default.title: Allin hamuy
adaptive_card.qa.title: Adaptive Card nisqap churayninkuna
qa.default.description: Kay ruway imayna Adaptive Card nisqata cargayta hinaspa localizayta wakichin chayta churay.
qa.default.title: Ñawpaq Adaptive Card wakichiy
qa.question.card_source.help: Akllay tarjetata imaynata cargayta: pack ukhupi JSON willaymanta, karu tarjetata packman apamuyta, utaq crudo inline tarjeta JSON qillqata k'askayta.
qa.question.card_source.label: Tarjetakuna imaynataq ñawpaqmanta cargakunan?
qa.question.catalog_registry_ref.help: Qay distributable tarjeta catálogo referencia nisqata, hina: store://greentic-biz/_/adaptive-cards/default utaq repo://my-repo/cards/catalog.json.
qa.question.catalog_registry_ref.label: Tarjeta catálogo referencia
qa.question.confirm_remove.help: Arí nisqata akllay kay componente configuración pichanapaq.
qa.question.confirm_remove.label: Kay Adaptive Card configuraciónta hurquychu?
qa.question.default_card_asset.help: Ñawpaq tarjeta asset ñannta utaq referencia nisqata qillqay. Ejemplo: assets/cards/welcome.json utaq repo://my-repo/cards/welcome.json
qa.question.default_card_asset.label: Ñawpaq tarjeta asset ñan/referencia
qa.question.default_card_inline.help: Mana invocation override qusqachu kaptin llamk'achisqa kananpaq ñawpaq Adaptive Card JSON nisqata k'askiy.
qa.question.default_card_inline.label: Ñawpaq Adaptive Card JSON nisqata k'askiy
qa.question.default_card_remote.help: Qillqay huk karu tarjeta qhawachiyta apanapaq, kayhina https://..., oci://..., store://..., utaq repo://..... Greentic Flow chayta local assets/cards/*.json ñanman tikrayta atinman manaraq apply_answers kutichinankama.
qa.question.default_card_remote.label: Karu tarjeta qhawachiy
qa.question.direction_mode.help: Akllay imayna tarjeta saphinqa qillqa direcciónninta churananpaq.
qa.question.direction_mode.label: Qillqa dirección
qa.question.language_mode.help: Akllay llapa built-in locale nisqakunata utaq sapanchasqa locale lista nisqata yanapanapaq.
qa.question.language_mode.label: Mayqin simikunatataq yanapayta munanki?
qa.question.multilingual.help: Inglés simiqa pakasqa saphin hina qhipaman kutichiq kachkan, achka simikunata llamk'achiptikipas.
qa.question.multilingual.label: Achka simikunata yanapayta munankichu?
qa.question.supported_locales.help: Qillqay locale codigokunata comawan rakisqa listapi. Ejemplu: en,fr,de
qa.question.supported_locales.label: Locale código nisqakunata qillqay
qa.question.trace_capture_inputs.help: Llamk'achisqa kaptin, trace nisqakunaqa payload, session, state hinaspa interaction yaykuykunata hap'iyta atinqa.
qa.question.trace_capture_inputs.label: Qatiykunapi yaykuykunata churay
qa.question.trace_enabled.help: Adaptive-card qatiy telemetriyata lluqsichiy recurso allichaypaq, watanakunapaq, hinallataq estado ruwanakunapaq.
qa.question.trace_enabled.label: Qatiyta atichiy
qa.question.update_area.help: Mayqin rakita componente nisqapa allichayninmanta musuqchayta akllay.
qa.question.update_area.label: ¿Imatataq musuqchayta munanki?
qa.question.validation_mode.help: Invocation schema sasachakuyninkuna imayna sinchita hap'isqa kananpaq akllay.
qa.question.validation_mode.label: Allinchasqa chiqaqchay modo
qa.remove.description: Kay componente allichayta hurquy utaq kutichiy.
qa.remove.title: Adaptive Card wakichiyta hurquy
qa.setup.description: Tarjeta ñawpaqchasqakunata, achka simi ruwayta, pusaqninchayta, allinchasqa chiqaqchayta, hinallataq qatiyta churay.
qa.setup.title: Adaptive Card wakichiy
qa.update.description: Adaptive Card allichaymanta huk rakillata sapa kuti musuqchay.
qa.update.title: Adaptive Card musuqchay
validation.card.empty-choices: Input.ChoiceSet nisqapi huk akllanakunaqa kanan punin
validation.card.empty-target-elements: Action.ToggleVisibility targetElements nisqa ama ch'usaqchu kanan
validation.card.invalid-card: Action.ShowCard card nisqa huk objeto kanan
validation.card.invalid-choice: Choices nisqaqa mana ch'usaq title hinallataq value niyuq kanan
validation.card.invalid-choices: Input.ChoiceSet choices nisqa huk array kanan
validation.card.invalid-columns: ColumnSet columns nisqa huk array kanan
validation.card.invalid-data: Action.Execute data nisqa kaptinqa huk objeto kanan
validation.card.invalid-root: Card nisqa huk JSON objeto kanan
validation.card.invalid-source: Media paqarinkunaqa mana ch'usaq url niyuq kanan
validation.invocation.invalid_enum: Invocation chakraqa mana yanapasqa enum chanintaqmi
validation.invocation.missing_field: Invocation nisqapi huk campo mañakusqa faltan
